source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A house is cooled by an electric heat pump using the outside as the high-temperature reservoir. Assume that the house is gaining energy from the outside indirect proportion to the temperature difference. When it is 35\circ\text{C} outside, estimate the percentage savings in electricity if the house is kept at 25\circ\text{C} instead of 20\circ\text{C}.
